top_tweets.text:
Design agencies are going to feel more pressure this year and next.

My recommendation: move positioning toward either premium branding or productized AI services.

Product design will continue moving in-house. That trend was already happening, and AI will likely accelerate it. https://t.co/fa5z66trZ1
top_tweets.author: alex_barashkov
top_tweets.name: Alex Barashkov
top_tweets.summary_zh: 設計代理商將面臨更大壓力，建議轉向高端品牌或產品化 AI 服務。產品設計將持續轉為內部化，AI 會加速這個趨勢。

top_tweets.text: I’m an AI critic who is also a staff software engineer. I am extremely familiar with what AI can and can’t be useful for. It’s best use cases are not as a consumer LLM product for writing prose or generating images and video, which is the main way it is being sold to the public.
top_tweets.author: barbarismcrit
top_tweets.name: barbarism critic
top_tweets.summary_zh: 作為軟體工程師的 AI 批評者指出，AI 最佳應用場景並非當前主流的消費級 LLM 產品（寫作、生成圖像影片），這是對市場的誤導。

top_tweets.text:

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容

top_products.title: Kinhub
top_products.author: Gabe Perez
top_products.tagline: Scalable coaching that drives real business impact
top_products.summary_zh: 為企業提供可擴展的教練服務平台，協助組織透過系統化的指導提升業務成效。

top_products.title: Blueprint
top_products.author: Alexander Tibbets
top_products.summary_zh: 幫助開發者一次性完成較大型的程式編寫任務，提高編碼效率。

top_products.title: Doza Assist
top_products.author: Chris Cardoza
top_products.tagline: Open-source local AI that learns how you edit video
top_products.summary_zh: 開源的本地 AI 助手，能學習使用者的影片編輯習慣並提供協助。

top_products.title: Devin for Terminal
top_products.author: Chris Messina
top_products.tagline: A CLI agent that keeps working when you close your laptop
top_products.summary_zh: 命令列 AI 代理工具，即使關閉電腦仍能在背景持續執行任務。

top_products.title: Curflow
top_products.author: Luis Mesa
top_products.tagline: Draw a gesture for your Mac to execute
top_products.summary_zh: 讓使用者在 Mac 上透過手勢繪製來觸發執行各種操作指令。

top_products.title: Colir
top_products.author: Roman Tsymbryla
top_products.tagline: Gradients that don't look like defaults
top_products.summary_zh: 提供非預設樣式的漸層色彩工具，幫助設計師創造更獨特的視覺效果。
